description: AI disclosure sentence — legally required first utterance on every new channel (EU AI Act Art. 50). Recording is not used, so no recording-consent language.
disclosure_en: Good afternoon, Mr./Ms. {last_name}. This is Kate — I'm an AI assistant from lease·a·kitchen.
opt_in_phrases_en: yes, please send me the offer
yes, that sounds interesting, send me the details
that's fine, email works for me
ai_question_reply_en: I'm an AI assistant — we wanted to be transparent about that from the start. Happy to keep helping, or I can connect you with a colleague.
privacy_reply_en: Our privacy page is at lease-a-kitchen.de/privacy. I can have a colleague send it by email if helpful.
legal_basis: EU AI Act Art. 50 (AI disclosure). §7 UWG is not triggered because we only call prospects who opted in via the landing page.
